results.command: bash -lc 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && python3 agent_ops/scripts/frontend_verify_gate.py --frontend-dir frontend/apps/web --expect-status PASS'
